author: gb9t
content: Iteration 68: ata/ahci-sata-host.md committed (ba13e9b, 215 lines). AHCI + per-SoC + per-vendor SATA host — every Intel/AMD desktop+server SATA, every embedded ARM SATA, every legacy Marvell/NVIDIA/Promise SATA card. ~92K LOC. ~15 per-SoC AHCI variants + ~10 per-vendor SATA hosts. Defenses: kernel-attached-direct-disk boundary. PRD entry length validated + DMA target validated (closes 'DMA to kernel-text → kernel rooting'), hot-plug event handler synchronized with in-flight cmds (closes CVE-2024-26583 sata_mv UAF), ATA SECURITY CAP_SYS_RAWIO + CAP_SYS_ADMIN (closes 'unprivileged sets ATA password → disk locked → data unrecoverable' REAL attack against laptops), EM CAP_SYS_ADMIN (drive bay LEDs as covert info-leak channel), D2H FIS source validation per port+slot (closes 'malicious drive forges FIS for sibling port'), PMP FBS validation (closes 'malicious PMP claims 256 devices → host OOM'). 68 docs / ~5.23M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/usb/dwc3 (DesignWare USB 3 — every Snapdragon/RK3399/ZynqMP/Allwinner H6 USB controller).
